Stripe Design System

Clean, modern financial design system used by millions.

Color Palette

  • Primary: #635BFF — Stripe Purple
  • Accent: #00D084 — Success Green
  • Background: #F6F9FC — Light Gray
  • Text: #1A1A1A — Near Black
  • Neutral: #6B7280 — Medium Gray
  • White: #FFFFFF
  • Error Red: #DF1B41
  • Warning: #FFB703

Typography

Primary font: Inter — used for all text

Display font: Inter — headings and hero text

Monospace font: Roboto Mono — code samples

Base size: 16px. Scale: 12/14/16/20/24/32/48px

Line height: 1.5 (body), 1.2 (headings)

Spacing

Base unit: 8px

Component padding: 16px, 24px

Section margin: 32px, 48px

Max-width: 1200px

Components

Card with 8px border-radius and subtle shadow

Accessibility

All color combinations meet WCAG 2.1 AA contrast requirements.

Minimum contrast ratio: 4.5:1 for text

Focus states: visible 2px outline in primary color
